title: Arena Animation is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Arena Animation is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Arena Animation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Arena Animation:
Arena Animation is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation!
